---
title: "R 语言数据分析"
---

::: {.tech-hero .r-hero}
## R 语言生物数据分析

R 语言是生物统计和可视化的利器。从 ggplot2 到 Bioconductor，R 生态系统为生命科学数据提供了强大的分析工具。
:::

## 快速入门

::: {.r-intro}
### 安装与配置

```r
# 安装 Bioconductor
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install()

# 安装常用生物信息学包
BiocManager::install(c("DESeq2", "edgeR", "limma", 
                        "GenomicRanges", "Biostrings"))
```

### 读取生物数据

```r
library(Biostrings)

# 读取 FASTA 文件
seqs <- readDNAStringSet("sequences.fa")
seqs[1:3]  # 查看前3条序列

# 序列统计
alphabetFrequency(seqs)
letterFrequency(seqs, letters = "GC")  # GC含量
```
:::

## RNA-seq 差异表达分析

::: {.analysis-section}
### DESeq2 分析流程

```r
library(DESeq2)

# 读取计数矩阵
countData <- read.csv("counts.csv", row.names = 1)
colData <- read.csv("sample_info.csv", row.names = 1)

# 创建 DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = countData,
    colData = colData,
    design = ~ condition
)

# 过滤低表达基因
dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10, ]

# 运行差异分析
dds <- DESeq(dds)
res <- results(dds)

# 查看结果
head(res[order(res$padj), ])
```

### 可视化

```r
library(ggplot2)

# MA 图
plotMA(res, main = "MA Plot", ylim = c(-5, 5))

# 火山图
res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
res_df$significant <- res_df$padj < 0.05 & abs(res_df$log2FoldChange) > 1

ggplot(res_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = significant), alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "#E74C3C")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Volcano Plot",
         x = "log2 Fold Change",
         y = "-log10 adjusted p-value")
```
:::

## 常用可视化

::: {.viz-grid}
::: {.viz-card}
#### 热图

```r
library(pheatmap)

# 选择差异表达基因
top_genes <- head(order(res$padj), 50)
mat <- assay(dds)[top_genes, ]
mat <- t(scale(t(mat)))  # 标准化

pheatmap(mat, 
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         main = "Differential Expression Heatmap")
```
:::

::: {.viz-card}
#### PCA 分析

```r
# 方差稳定转换
vsd <- vst(dds)

# PCA 图
plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition") +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle("PCA of RNA-seq Samples")
```
:::
:::

## 实用函数库

::: {.tip-box}
#### 自定义函数：快速绘制基因表达

```r
plot_gene_expression <- function(dds, gene_id) {
    gene_counts <- plotCounts(dds, gene = gene_id, 
                              intgroup = "condition",
                              returnData = TRUE)
    ggplot(gene_counts, aes(x = condition, y = count)) +
        geom_boxplot() +
        geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
        scale_y_log10() +
        theme_minimal() +
        labs(title = paste("Expression of", gene_id))
}

# 使用
plot_gene_expression(dds, "ENSG00000141510")
```
:::

::: {.text-center .mt-4}
[查看 Linux 笔记](/linux.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2}
[查看 C++ 笔记](/cpp.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
